The HTML acronym means "HyperText Markup Language".
You can create tables with the tag <table>.
The tag <td> is a table row.
You can draw lines and circles in a <canvas>.
A HTML 5 document must begin with <!DOCTYPE html>.
The CSS acronym means "Conditional Style Sheets"
There are only 2 ways to place styles in a HTML document: External CSS and inline CSS.
You can change the text size using font-size.
You can change the color of the text using font-color.
You can change the background color using background-color or background.
You can make columns with float:left.
You can center a div with margin: 0 auto.
You can change the style of a html class with #myclass{}.
You can change the style of a html class with .myclass{}.
You can underline a text with text-decoration: underline;.
